data.description: Hierarchical Reduced-Order Model Predictive Control for Robust Locomotion on Humanoid Robots cites or references Any2Any: Efficient Cross-Embodiment Transfer for Humanoid Whole-Body Tracking.
Uses the Unitree G1 humanoid robot, produced by Unitree, as the hardware platform for experiments.
Validates the hierarchical MPC framework through simulation and hardware experiments on the Unitree G1 humanoid robot.
